response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience and solid TypeScript/Node.js depth, but falls significantly short of the Staff GenAI FDE profile. His AI credentials are thin and recent — limited to vague mentions of 'agentic workflows' and MCP code generators starting April 2025 — with no documented experience in RAG, vector databases, LLMs, or AI-specific frameworks. Python, the primary language for AI work, does not appear anywhere in his resume. The role demands 8+ years building production AI solutions; this candidate has perhaps months of AI-adjacent work. The MCP experience is genuinely relevant and could warrant a brief exploratory conversation, but the gap between his profile and the Staff GenAI seniority bar is substantial.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic workflow tooling experience at re:cinq — directly aligned with key technologies listed
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js background with proven delivery across high-scale systems (Dunnhumby: millions of requests/sec; Optilyz: millions of mails/year)
Staff-level track record including mentorship, knowledge sharing (workshops, talks), and cross-functional technical leadership
concerns: Python absent from skills and employment history — a critical gap for production AI/ML engineering at this level
No demonstrable experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or named multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)
GenAI exposure is limited to ~2 months at current role with no quantified outcomes; the role requires 8+ years of production AI delivery
